name: Easy Pumpkin Nut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the nut cookie crust. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a large bowl, lightly beat the eggs. Stir in pumpkin, brown sugar, cinnamon, salt, cloves, ginger, and nutmeg until smooth.
3. Gradually stir in evaporated milk. Pour mixture into prepared crust.
4. Cover the edge of the crust with 3-inch strips of aluminum foil to prevent excessive browning.
5. Bake for 15 minutes at 425°F. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F.
6. Continue baking until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean, about 45-55 more minutes. Allow pie to cool completely.
7. Prepare brown sugar whipped cream by mixing with additional brown sugar.
8. Serve pie with brown sugar whipped cream. Cover and refrigerate any remaining pie.
